## Investment View
CMO scores 72/100 as a constructive_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 0 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (111.54), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Volume anomaly is strong at 2.06, which supports the move. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 111.54 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
